violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Salads packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels, missing subingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Ceiling tile around pipes is stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on ice machine. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
Ceiling tiles in the kitchen are stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
One ceiling tile above food prep unit is missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service, and bagged ice brought in for use until the ice machine is cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
